channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NASA's DART spacecraft changed a binary asteroid's orbit around the sun, in a first for a human-made object
item.description: When NASA crashed a spacecraft into the asteroid moonlet Dimorphos in 2022, it altered both Dimorphos' orbit around its parent asteroid, Didymos, and the two objects' orbit around the sun, according to new research. NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory (JPL) said in a press release that this "marks the first time a human-made object has measurably altered the path of a celestial body around the Sun." It's a promising result as scientists work to find a feasible method of defending Earth from hazardous space objects.The Double Asteroid Redirection Test (DART) mission was designed to demonstrate one...

item.title: There Was Just an Unusually Unsettling Pentagon-Related Resignation at OpenAI
item.description: It wasn't an acrimonious departure, but this specific resignation coming right now might be cause for some soul-searching internally.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch UFC 326 for $1
item.description: Here's our guide on a super simple way to stream UFC 326 for $1 from anywhere in the world, with Holloway vs Oliveira 2 set to decide the BMF title.

item.title: OpenAI robotics lead Caitlin Kalinowski quits in response to Pentagon deal
item.description: Hardware executive Caitlin Kalinowski announced today that in response to OpenAI's controversial agreement with the Department of Defense, she’s resigned from her role leading the company's robotics team.

item.title: Seeing Jabba the Hutt’s Son in ‘The Mandalorian & Grogu’ Is Breaking Me
item.description: It's not weird that Rotta the Hutt is back so much as it's weird he's coming back via 'The Mandalorian and Grogu,' of all things.

item.title: A Bizarre International War Inside One Chip Company Threatens the Global Automotive Industry
item.description: The international divisions at Nexperia seem to hate each other so much that Chinese-Dutch international diplomacy has failed to smoothed things over.

item.title: UFC 326 live stream: how to watch Holloway vs Oliveira 2, start time, preview, full card
item.description: Two legendary lightweights in a rematch 11 years in the making – follow our guide to live stream UFC 326 online and watch Holloway vs Oliveira 2 from anywhere.

item.title: OpenAI's head of robotics resigns following deal with the Department of Defense
item.description: OpenAI is going to need to find a new head of robotics. Caitlin Kalinowski, OpenAI's now-former head of robotics, posted on X that she was resigning from her role, while criticizing the company's haste in partnering with the Department of Defense without investigating proper guardrails. Kalinowski, who previously worked at Meta before leaving to join OpenAI in late 2024, wrote on X that "surveillance of Americans without judicial oversight and lethal autonomy without human authorization are lines that deserved more deliberation than they got." Responding to another post, the former OpenAI exec...

item.title: How to watch UFC live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch UFC for free. Live stream the UFC for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Holloway vs. Oliveira in UFC 326 online for free
item.description: How to watch UFC for free. Live stream the Holloway vs. Oliveira in UFC 326 for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle is under market price at Amazon — score the best preorder deal
item.description: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle is available to pre-order for under $50 at Amazon.

item.title: 'What begins as a phone call from 'IT support' ends with a fully instrumented network compromise': This fake tech support scam tricks employees into infecting their own company devices
item.description: Attackers deliberately crash browsers, impersonate IT staff, and convince employees to install malicious tools that deploy Havoc malware across corporate systems.

item.title: Sony may be experimenting with dynamic pricing for its PlayStation Store
item.description: Sony may be experimenting with dynamic pricing for its PlayStation Store
